title: campanula carnica subsp. carnica
intro: Campanula carnica subsp. carnica, also known as the Alpine Bellflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a popular choice for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Campanula carnica subsp. carnica include its antiseptic and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and ease congestion. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in the form of dried flowers, leaves, and roots to create a variety of medicinal preparations.
